name: Bismuth Oxychloride
description: A mineral commonly used in makeup to provide a pearlescent finish.
scientificSummary: An inorganic compound used primarily as a pigment and texture enhancer in cosmetics; can be irritating for very sensitive skin.
mechanismOfAction: Its crystalline structure reflects light, creating a shimmer or 'glow' effect on the skin surface.

seo.title: Bismuth Oxychloride in Cosmetics | Dew Theory
seo.description: Understand the role of Bismuth Oxychloride in providing that luminous finish in makeup.
